message:
feat(conformance): add cancellation protocol and race-drain conformance tests (bd-j941d)

Seven tests covering cancellation non-negotiable invariants:
- CANCEL-001: Timeout cancels running task (side-effect observable)
- CANCEL-002: Cleanup ordering on cancellation
- CANCEL-003: Nested timeout composition (inner tighter than outer)
- CANCEL-004: Race loser drain (terminal flag unset)
- CANCEL-005: Timeout no-op on completed task
- CANCEL-006: Multiple timeouts resolve independently
- CANCEL-007: Cancellation propagates via resource drop (channel)

Adds Sync bound to tests::all_tests and run_conformance_suite to
support timeout futures that capture &RT (Send requires Sync).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
